description: A new user completes registration with email and password
A user logs in with email/password credentials
A user explicitly logs out of the application
A user authenticates via Google or Apple OAuth (new signup or returning login)
A user requests a password reset email
A user successfully resets their password using a reset token
A user starts a new game against the Stockfish computer engine
A game vs the computer reaches a final result (checkmate, draw, resignation, timeout)
A user creates a game invite link to share with another player
A second player accepts a game invite and the game begins
The creator cancels their pending game invite before it is accepted
A user submits a report against another player (e.g. for cheating or misconduct)
A user updates their username or avatar URL in their profile settings
